## Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed API

```python
# Sketch of how the feature would be used
from pyserep import proposed_function

result = proposed_function(...)
```

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.

## Are you willing to contribute a PR?
- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] Yes, with some guidance
- [ ] No, but I'd like someone else to
